info.name: KinaraHub iOS API
info.description: All API endpoints consumed by the KinaraHub iOS app. Base URL: http://localhost/kinarahub/api/v1

response.name: 200 — Success
401 — Invalid credentials
200 — New tokens
401 — Invalid refresh token
200 — Logged out
200 — Paginated products
